source_commit_note: Dispatch should use the merge commit that adds score24/w16 reduced-replica recost support and should wait until the score24/w16 L1 PPA item is merged.

requested_items.objective: Recost the measured q8/k8/v8 score24/w16 exact-div composed dual-stream attention wrapper at the area-fit replica count and measured wrapper clock.

expected_result.reason: The mixed/int8 quality-energy frontier selected qkv8_float_exact as the only quality-backed point; this substitutes the closest measured score24/w16 q8/k8/v8 wrapper into the Llama7B schedule.
